meta.name: Design Guidelines v2
meta.description: A sharper flat design system with technical dossier layout, one accent channel, and near-square geometry.

display.usage: Headlines, tabs, KPI values, and shell branding.

body.usage: Labels, forms, rows, helper text, and system copy.

componentRules.panel: Solid surface, explicit border, restrained shadow, hard grouping.
componentRules.button: Single accent channel, flat fill, fast tactile response.
componentRules.input: Clean field, visible border, no ornamental treatment.
componentRules.table: Strong separators and compact rhythm for operational clarity.

dashboardFit.tradeoff: Strongest on clarity and implementation simplicity, but less luxurious than v1 or v3.
